description: CompositionPink and rust coloured shaded kurti made of 100% cotton, has a square neckline with lace, yoke on the chest along with pin-tucks, lace, embroidery and sequins on the front and back, front buttoned placket with a vented hem on the front, three quarter sleeves with embroidery and sequins on the cuffs and a curved hem, FitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThis kurti is made of soft cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather. The pretty lace, embroidery and sequins add to your femininity. Wear this over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up or down with your choice of accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
